text:
The is a student body that governs Attack Junior High School.

Story

Each of their members had their club meeting on a normal school day.

After the fall of the previous leadership in a scandal, the president of the student council is ousted and an election is scheduled. Eren Jaeger, Jean Kirschtein, Reiner Braun, Oruo Bozad, Rico Brzenska, and others all declare their intention of running. When they hear that Ilse Langnar, a member of the newspaper club, may have a notebook that contains the secret to winning the election, they pursue her in an attempt to procure it. Upon finally stealing it, however, they are disappointed to find that it only contains a plan for cleaning the school. When the time comes for the candidates to give their speeches, they all unintentionally alienate the students. However, when Marco Bodt attempts to defend Jean, he ends up awing the audience and subsequently being elected president by a large margin.
